meta.description: Twenty-seven years restoring function, structure, confidence — with steady hands. Horizontal editorial. South Bay, CA.

sections.eyebrow: Dr. Jorge Arce · Oral & Maxillofacial Surgery · South Bay, California
sections.sub: Board-certified in dental implantology. Trained in Colombia, built in California — the complex extractions, reconstructions, and full-arch implant cases other surgeons refer out.

photo.alt: Dr. Jorge Arce in his clinic
photo.label: clínica vertical

sections.title: From Colombia to the South Bay.
paras: Dr. Arce trained in Colombia and built his life's work in California, devoting his career entirely to oral and maxillofacial surgery and dental implantology.

Board certified in implantology, he has spent twenty-seven years on the procedures most surgeons refer out — complex extractions, reconstruction, and full-arch implant cases. In 2007 he founded the Dental Implants Center of South Bay, guided by one conviction: difficult work, done with care, gives people their lives back.

sections.title: The work of a career spent on <sc>difficult cases.</sc>
sections.sub: Not a list of services — the disciplines refined over nearly three decades.
cards: From single implants to full-arch All-On-X reconstruction, planned and placed with precision.
Rebuilding function and structure where bone and tissue have been lost.
The difficult extractions and surgeries other clinicians prefer to refer elsewhere.
Long-term care that protects the work of a restored smile.
Identifying and addressing conditions affecting teeth, gums, and bone.
Clarity and direction for patients facing complex decisions.

sections.title: Precision is a form of respect.
paras: Jorge grew up in Colombia, the son of a family that valued precision and patience long before he ever held a scalpel. Medicine was not a career choice so much as a calling — a way to use his hands to give something back.

Over twenty-seven years he built a practice on a single, unglamorous principle: take the time the case actually needs. Outside the operating room he is a father, a mentor to younger surgeons, and a quiet student of his craft — still reading, still refining.

stats: Founded · Dental Implants Center of South Bay

sections.title: The people who were <sc>there.</sc>
sections.sub: Patients and referring doctors, on twenty-seven years of quiet precision.

cards.q: I had been told by two surgeons it was impossible. Dr. Arce took the time no one else did. I can eat, smile, and speak again.
When a case is beyond what I can handle, Jorge is the first call I make. My patients always come back grateful — and so do I.
The most thorough and honest surgeon I have ever met. He treated my father like family.
Calm, precise, and genuinely kind. He explained every step until I understood. The result speaks for itself.
I refer my most complex cases to Dr. Arce without hesitation. Twenty-seven years shows.
I was terrified of the procedure. He never rushed me. Best decision I have made for my health.
Reliable, communicative, and surgically excellent. He sends my patients back with a full report every time.
Years of pain, gone. I only wish I had found him sooner. I recommend Dr. Arce to everyone I know.
The level of care and follow-up is rare. My patients trust him, and that trust reflects back on my practice.

Separating fear from fact, so you can make a calm, informed decision about your health.

sections.title: Sharing the craft with <sc>the profession.</sc>
sections.lead: Beyond the operating room, Dr. Arce lectures and mentors — training the next generation of surgeons and speaking on implantology and complex reconstruction. Available for conferences, study clubs, and resident training.
